citations.desc: Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors).
citations.narrative:
Female Havanese, ID#3705's right ear had dark material and the skin was lightly red and felt slightly thickened. These are
signs of an active ear condition. The licensee was not treating this and has not trimmed the ear hair and cleaned the ear
and did not have the ear cleanser/products on hand that the program of veterinary care indicates should be used to start
treating this condition. Untreated ear conditions such as this can cause discomfort and in some cases spread to other
dogs. Ensure the attending veterinarian is contacted about this dog's ear and begin treatment as indicated by the
attending veterinarian.
***Correct by 4/10/2026

citations.desc: Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control.
citations.narrative:
In each exercise pen there are areas of plastic seed netting that is loose and in piles. The seed netting was spread out in
the fall to plant grass, however over the winter is loose, creating areas of plastic netting that dogs could chew on or trip on
if they run over it. To protect dogs health, ensure that any loose seed netting is removed.
***Correct by 4/11/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative.
n

narrative:
2.40(b)(2) 
   
Attending veterinarian and adequate veterinary care (dealers and exhibitors). 
Female Havanese, ID#3705's right ear had dark material and the skin was lightly red and felt slightly thickened. These are 
signs of an active ear condition. The licensee was not treating this and has not trimmed the ear hair and cleaned the ear 
and did not have the ear cleanser/products on hand that the program of veterinary care indicates should be used to start 
treating this condition. Untreated ear conditions such as this can cause discomfort and in some cases spread to other 
dogs. Ensure the attending veterinarian is contacted about this dog's ear and begin treatment as indicated by the 
attending veterinarian.  
***Correct by 4/10/2026 
3.11(c) 
   
Cleaning, sanitization, housekeeping, and pest control. 
In each exercise pen there are areas of plastic seed netting that is loose and in piles. The seed netting was spread out in 
the fall to plant grass, however over the winter is loose, creating areas of plastic netting that dogs could chew on or trip on 
if they run over it. To protect dogs health, ensure that any loose seed netting is removed. 
***Correct by 4/11/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representative. 
 
 n
